DROP TABLE IF EXISTS "gObL_t";
CREATE TABLE "gObL_t" (
"t_id" integer PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
"t_active" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
"t_archived" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
"t_optional_flag" integer NULL DEFAULT NULL,
"t_score" real NOT NULL,
"t_unsigned_score" real NOT NULL,
"t_nullable_score" real NULL DEFAULT NULL,
"t_amount" numeric NOT NULL,
"t_unsigned_amount" numeric NOT NULL,
"t_amount_default" numeric NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
"t_nullable_amount" numeric NULL DEFAULT NULL,

);
